# letmepost.dev

> Open-source social media publishing API for developers and AI agents.
> One POST endpoint publishes across eight platforms. Native MCP server,
> idempotency by default, version-pinned upstream APIs, transparent
> error responses. Apache 2.0. The hosted SaaS runs the same image you
> can self-host.

## What it is

letmepost.dev is a single API for publishing posts to social platforms.
You send one HTTP request; we handle per-platform OAuth flows, version
drift, rate limits, retries, idempotency, and webhook delivery.

Where existing APIs (Ayrshare, Buffer, Hootsuite) fail silently, bill
per-profile, and break every six months, letmepost.dev fails loudly,
bills per-org, and pins API versions internally.

Built for two audiences:
- Developers shipping social features into their own product
- AI agents (via the native MCP server at api.letmepost.dev/mcp)

## Status (as of 2026-05-26)

- Bluesky, X (Twitter), Pinterest — live end-to-end
- Instagram, Facebook, Threads, LinkedIn — in platform review
- TikTok — planned for v2

## Pricing

- Free: 50 posts/month, full API surface, indefinite (not a trial)
- Pro: $79/mo, 5,000 posts/month
- Business: $299/mo, 25,000 posts/month, 99.9% SLA
- All flat per-org. Profiles, accounts, team members, webhooks, API keys
  are all free. Hard caps, no overage surprises.

- Homepage: https://letmepost.dev/

## API surfaces

- Publishing: https://letmepost.dev/api/publishing
- Media: https://letmepost.dev/api/media
- Webhooks: https://letmepost.dev/api/webhooks
- Full docs: https://docs.letmepost.dev

- Self-host: https://docs.letmepost.dev/self-host
